title: Sole proprietorship; partnership; corporation; association with licensed business
doc_html:
§3294. Sole proprietorship; partnership; corporation; association with licensed business

            A. This Chapter shall not prohibit one or more businesses from practicing through a partnership, corporation, or association.

            B. In any partnership, corporation, or association whose primary activity consists of providing services regulated by this Chapter, at least one partner or corporate officer shall be licensed as a business under this Chapter.

            C. Nothing in this Section shall be construed to render inapplicable any other provisions of this Chapter.

            Acts 1984, No. 505, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1985; Acts 1989, No. 552, §1; Acts 2024, No. 438, §1.
doc_text:
§3294.  Sole proprietorship; partnership; corporation; association with licensed business
A.  This Chapter shall not prohibit one or more businesses from practicing through
a partnership, corporation, or association.
B.  In any partnership, corporation, or association whose primary activity consists of
providing services regulated by this Chapter, at least one partner or corporate officer shall
be licensed as a business under this Chapter.
C.  Nothing in this Section shall be construed to render inapplicable any other
provisions of this Chapter.
Acts 1984, No. 505, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1985; Acts 1989, No. 552, §1; Acts 2024, No.
438, §1.
